calendar.matters:
MINOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-06-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calender this day for a request to change of name for minor Manhattan Jane Liu.

Dept:505; Judeg: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record", commencing at 9:36:30a.m. and concluding at 9:42:09 a.m.

Petitioner Ruby Liu appeared in pro per, was placed under oath and testified.

The court examines Petitioner. Petitioner testifies.
There are no objections to the name change of the minor.

Good cause appearing, the Court GRANTS petitioner's request to change name of minor MANHATTAN JANE LIU to MANHATTAN JANE LIU RODRIGUES.

Proposed Decree Changing Name signed and filed this day.
